Assets and inference endpoint must be in: Assets and inference endpoint must be in the same project.
Before submitting to overseas BytePlus,: Before submitting to overseas BytePlus, upload reference media to the asset library and replace it with asset://id. Avoids real-face / content pre-filter interception.
Pre-create the asset group in the BytePl: Pre-create the asset group in the BytePlus console (sign the authorization letter on first use).
Visible to you only on the next screen. Make sure to copy it before closing.
A username, password, group and quota ar: A username, password, group and quota are pre-filled using your auto-create settings. Edit anything before confirming.
Copy these credentials and share them th: Copy these credentials and share them through your secure channel. They will not be shown again.
